race.description: Mac's Hotel After The Last Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: We've made it to the last of 30 and hoping to go home a winner in the form of ICY POLE (4) for local trainer Matthew Williams. She was well backed and won accordingly first up at Stawell, coming away to score by two lengths. Looks to have come back better and should get a lovely run with Meech sticking. DIRNASEER (7) resumes having gone to the paddock a winner here. He's progressive and should have been wound up for the Payne yard. BIG ROOSTER (11) won a Terang maiden on heavy going first up for the Wilde yard. Didn't beat a whole lot there but will have been set to come here and has plenty of upside. EIRE OF FORTUNE (14) was in the market but struggled at Ballarat last start. Off a short spell for this, she did win her maiden here on debut on heavy ground. GALLANT PRINCE (3) ran well enough fresh at Pakenham and gets Nash on, in the mix.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 [Provincial] Warrnambool May Racing Carnival - Prize Money: $50,000
